title.zh: 为什么企业要自研中间件

summary.en: An engineering and organizational perspective on when self-built middleware becomes justified and what tradeoffs it introduces.
summary.zh: 从技术演进、企业规模与组织治理三个维度，讨论企业为什么会在开源、二开、自研之间反复摇摆，以及基础架构团队的真正边界。

readingDirection.en: Read this when evaluating build-vs-buy decisions or the long-term cost model of infrastructure platforms.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在评估中间件建设边界、平台团队职责和企业规模对技术决策影响时阅读。
